name: Puffco Peak Pro Joystick Cap
summary: Enhance your smoking experience with the Peak Pro Joystick Cap.
description: Enhance your smoking experience with the Peak Pro Joystick Cap. This unique cap utilizes precise 360º directional airflow to ensure consistent heating and enhance the flavour of your smoke. Crafted from high-quality stainless steel and silicone, the Joystick is easy to clean and prevents any reclaim from disrupting your flow. Additionally, its playful design adds an element of enjoyment to your sessions. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
